title: Netherite Armors Revamp
description: Voxelity's Netherite Armor textures, updated with the armor texture location changes from 1.21.3!
body:
# About
~~Duplicates the textures in Voxelity's amazing [Netherite Armors Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/netherite-armors) to conform with the 1.21.3 changes to armor texture locations, so it works in later versions! None of the textures are mine, and use the original if you can.~~

UPDATE 9/05/2026
These textures are from Voxelity, but as the original resource pack has been taken down (for reasons unknown/unclear to me), I will be editing the metadata and continuing to maintain this resource packs for versions below 1.21.3 as well.
